rationale: The citing paper references Jerath and Zhang (2010) mainly to note that the store-within-a-store concept is becoming more common. The citation appears in a limitations/future-research discussion to contrast PICs with a broader SWS format, rather than to build hypotheses, derive mechanisms, or guide empirical design. There is no clear evidence that this cited paper materially underpins the article's core contingent alignment framework or analyses.
